positive: A majestic, stylized polar bear standing on a monolithic iceberg at sunrise. The scene should feature minimalist, geometric representation of Arctic ice crystals and gentle waves. Focus on clean, graphic lines and strong silhouettes. The bear should have a powerful, regal posture, looking directly at the viewer. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep navy blues, stark white, icy aqua, and soft gold gradients for the sunrise. Composition must be centered and vertically oriented, perfect for apparel printing. Style: Modern graphic art meets Nordic folk illustration, highly detailed linework, vector art quality. Composition must allow for white space surrounding the subject.
